description: Every customer must have at least 1 order
Each order has 1-3 order lines (TIGHT - creates tension: 800 orders * 3 max = 2400 max lines vs 5000 target)
90% of products must appear in order lines
Each customer has 10-15 orders (TIGHT - 100 cust * 15 max = 1500 vs 800 target)
Every supplier must supply at least 1 product
Each supplier supplies 50-100 products (20 suppliers * 50 min = 1000 min)
80% of products must have a supplier
